title: Croatian Hazelnut Shish Skewers
description: A delicious and easy-to-make skewer dish featuring Croatian sausage, hazelnuts, and a mouthwatering marinade.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon zest, garlic, and a pinch of salt.
Add Croatian sausage, red onion, bell pepper, and hazelnuts to the bowl, tossing to coat with marinade.
Thread the marinated ingredients onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until the sausage is cooked through and the vegetables are tender.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley.
